privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: We care about the confidentiality of your personal data. This policy explains how {{productName}} collects, uses, and protects information when you use the platform.

sections.dataCollectBody: We only collect personal data required to operate the platform, such as your email address, display name, and the content you create while using {{productName}}.
sections.dataUseBody: We use personal data to provide requested services, including notifications, account management, and product experience personalization.
sections.dataSharingBody: We do not sell personal data. We only share data in the following situations:
sections.securityBody: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.
sections.retentionBody: We retain data only as long as needed to provide services, unless a longer period is required or permitted by law.
sections.rightsBody: Depending on applicable law, you may have rights to access, correct, delete, limit, or object to processing of your personal data, and to request portability.
sections.updatesBody: We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on this page.

sharingCases: If sharing is required to provide a feature you requested.
If disclosure is required by law or judicial process.

terms.title: Terms Of Use

sections.purposeBody: {{productName}} is a collaborative exchange platform designed to support non-monetary interactions through an internal accounting unit named token.
sections.tokenNatureBody: token is an internal unit used within {{productName}}. It is not:
sections.exchangesBody: Exchanges are negotiated freely between participants, with no official pricing table. Users are solely responsible for legal, tax, and social obligations that may apply to their activity.
sections.endowmentBody: To support platform operation and development, a platform endowment equivalent to 10% of each validated exchange volume may be minted in token and assigned to a dedicated platform account.
sections.transparencyBody: {{productName}} communicates the core principles of token usage and may evolve the system over time to preserve legal compliance and product sustainability.

tokenProperties: is not bought or sold against official currency
is not pegged to labor time or a stable external index
does not provide any conversion, refund, or guaranteed value
